description_long: This warehouse is a single-story, rectangular structure with a flat, gray-tiled roof featuring a prominent array of solar panels. The exterior walls are painted a muted blue-gray, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The building is surrounded by a paved area, likely for vehicle access and loading, and is partially enclosed by tall, plain boundary walls on three sides. The main entrance appears to be a large, white roll-up door, suitable for vehicle or goods entry, with additional standard doors and windows distributed along the facade. The roof is unadorned except for the solar panels, and there are no visible decorative elements, emphasizing a functional, utilitarian design. The overall appearance suggests a modern, energy-efficient warehouse intended for storage and logistics operations in an urban environment.
description: A modern, blue-gray warehouse with a flat roof featuring solar panels, surrounded by paved access and boundary walls. The facade is functional with large entry doors and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: The roof with solar panels and the rear boundary wall are most visible, with minimal facade detail.
description_view_1: The main facade is visible, showing the large roll-up door, windows, and paved entry area.
description_view_2: The side of the building and the solar panels on the roof are prominent, with a partial view of the entry area.
description_view_3: The long side of the warehouse is shown, highlighting the row of windows and the full extent of the solar panels.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a large white roll-up garage door, several rectangular windows with white trim, and a plain blue-gray wall surface. The entry area is paved, and the design is strictly functional with no decorative elements.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and covered with gray tiles, featuring a prominent array of solar panels arranged in a grid pattern. There are no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop structures.
